ListItem.Para: Door is deactivated in retracted position.
Associated air conditioning pack operates normally.

Note.Para: For an air conditioning pack to be operating normally, certain items associated with that system must operate normally. See MEL item 21-51-01 for a list of those items.

MaintenanceProcedure.Para: Deactivate deflector door in retracted position (AMM DDG 21-51-02).

ListItem.Para: For left CAC deflector door:
Set left air conditioning pack OFF.
Set the GND TEST selector to ENABLE no less than 30-seconds prior to opening the Pack Control Unit circuit breakers.
Open the following circuit breakers and lock with a DO NOT CLOSE tag.
PACK CTRL UNIT- CHAN L1
PACK CTRL UNIT- CHAN L2
Gain access to the left CAC deflector door assembly.
Disconnect, cap and stow deflector door actuator electrical connector.
Remove bolt, countersunk washer, bushing, washer and nut from rod end of actuator and CAC deflector door clevis.
Remove fixed link from stowed position on actuator and reinstall on opposite side of actuator with short end toward deflector door.
Reinstall actuator in its normal position with the fixed link attached to the closed deflector door.
Confirm deflector door is in retracted position.
Close the following circuit breakers:
PACK CTRL UNIT- CHAN L1
PACK CTRL UNIT- CHAN L2
Return the GND TEST selector to NORM.
Set left air conditioning PACK switch to AUTO.
For right CAC deflector door:
Set right air conditioning pack OFF.
Set the GND TEST selector to ENABLE no less than 30-seconds prior to opening the Pack Control Unit circuit breakers.
Open the following circuit breakers and lock with a DO NOT CLOSE tag.
PACK CTRL UNIT- CHAN R1
PACK CTRL UNIT- CHAN R2
Gain access to the right CAC deflector door assembly.
Disconnect, cap and stow deflector door actuator electrical connector.
Remove bolt, countersunk washer, bushing, washer and nut from rod end of actuator and CAC deflector door clevis.
Remove fixed link from stowed position on actuator and reinstall on opposite side of actuator with short end toward deflector door.
Reinstall actuator in its normal position with the fixed link attached to the closed deflector door.
Confirm deflector door is in retracted position.
Close the following circuit breakers:
PACK CTRL UNIT- CHAN R1
PACK CTRL UNIT- CHAN R2
Return the GND TEST selector to NORM.
Set right air conditioning PACK switch to AUTO.

OperationNote.Para: To reduce the possibility of ingesting foreign material into the CAC, set associated PACK OFF during takeoff and landing when operating on contaminated runways.

ListItem.Para: Door is deactivated in extended position.
Associated air conditioning pack is considered inoperative.
Opposite air conditioning pack operates normally.
Appropriate performance adjustment are applied.

Note.Para: Use Boeing Onboard Performance Tool (OPT) to determine take-off weight and/or landing weight as it affects aircraft performance.
The airplane must also be dispatched using MEL item 21-52-01.
For an air conditioning pack to be operating normally, certain items associated with that system must operate normally. See MEL item 21-51-01 for a list of those items.

MaintenanceProcedure.Para: Deactivate deflector door in extended position (AMM DDG 21-51-02).

ListItem.Para: For left CAC deflector door:
Set left air conditioning pack OFF.
Set the GND TEST selector to ENABLE no less than 30-seconds prior to opening the Pack Control Unit circuit breakers.
Open the following circuit breakers and lock with a DO NOT CLOSE tag.
PACK CTRL UNIT- CHAN L1
PACK CTRL UNIT- CHAN L2
Gain access to the left CAC deflector door assembly.
Disconnect, cap and stow deflector door actuator electrical connector.
Remove bolt, countersunk washer, bushing, washer and nut from rod end of actuator and CAC deflector door clevis.
Remove fixed link from stowed position on actuator and reinstall on opposite side of actuator with long end toward deflector door.
Reinstall actuator in its normal position with the fixed link attached to the opened deflector door.
Confirm deflector door is in the fully extended position.
Close the following circuit breakers:
PACK CTRL UNIT- CHAN L1
PACK CTRL UNIT- CHAN L2
Return the GND TEST selector to NORM.
Set left air conditioning PACK switch to OFF.
For right CAC deflector door:
Set right air conditioning pack OFF.
Set the GND TEST selector to ENABLE no less than 30-seconds prior to opening the Pack Control Unit circuit breakers.
Open the following circuit breakers and lock with a DO NOT CLOSE tag.
PACK CTRL UNIT- CHAN R1
PACK CTRL UNIT- CHAN R2
Gain access to the right CAC deflector door assembly.
Disconnect, cap and stow deflector door actuator electrical connector.
Remove bolt, countersunk washer, bushing, washer and nut from rod end of actuator and CAC deflector door clevis.
Remove fixed link from stowed position on actuator and reinstall on opposite side of actuator with long end toward deflector door.
Reinstall actuator in its normal position with the fixed link attached to the opened deflector door.
Confirm deflector door is in the fully extended position.
Close the following circuit breakers:
PACK CTRL UNIT- CHAN R1
PACK CTRL UNIT- CHAN R2
Return the GND TEST selector to NORM.
Set right air conditioning PACK switch to OFF.

OperationProcedure.Para: Apply performance adjustments per MEL item 21-52-01.

Note.Para: Use Boeing Onboard Performance Tool (OPT) to determine take-off weight and/or landing weight as it affects aircraft performance.
